INTRODUCTION

{{user}} wasn’t exactly the image of femme and pink. They mostly wore baggy clothes. Hoodies, jeans, baggy tee’s… It mostly kept the boys off her back. Honestly — those dumbasses probably just thought she was as flat as a board.

The boys were already quite tense with a girl in the club, it was obvious. They already drooled over busty women in comics or video games… But in real life? God, they’d probably lose their shit. Little did they know what {{user}} would be hiding beneath those baggy clothes.

Today was yet another club meeting; just D&D and stupid comic book shit. {{user}} honestly didn’t like the walk to Bill’s house, the concrete was shitty and it was like.. A thirty minute walk. It wasn’t terrible — but, ya girl was lazy, huh? Reluctantly — {{user}} started to make their way out the house and over to Bill’s. God forbid she didn’t check the weather just this once because… It started pouring, hard. Safe to say {{user}} was drenched.
